WO-SPEC-DTO-DEMOGRAPHICS.title: Decouple Demographics from WorldState
WO-SPEC-DTO-DEMOGRAPHICS.instruction_raw: Refine MISSION_spec_dto_demographics.md. Focus on DemographicManager and AgentLifecycleManager. Propose interface-based registry injection.

WO-SPEC-DTO-VITAL-STATS.title: Decouple Vital Stats from WorldState
WO-SPEC-DTO-VITAL-STATS.instruction_raw: Refine MISSION_spec_dto_vital_stats.md. Focus on DemographicManager and BirthSystem. Propose registry injection.

WO-SPEC-MEM-LEAK.title: SPEC: Resolve Global Audit Leaks and Agent Engine Bloat
WO-SPEC-MEM-LEAK.instruction_raw: Analyze the provided audit reports regarding memory explosions (GLOBAL_WALLET_LOG unbounded growth and per-agent engine instantiation). Design a detailed MISSION_SPEC to implement a GC-safe logging mechanism and a Singleton Engine (SEO) pattern for household agents. Address TD-MEM-GLOBAL-AUDIT-LEAK and TD-MEM-AGENT-ENGINE-BLOAT. The specification must adhere to `mission-doc-restructure` logic.
